title: Code 100K: Democratizing Tech
description: An initiative to provide 100,000 rural and underprivileged students with free access to high-tier premium software engineering bootcamps, complete with cloud credits and direct mentoring support.
highlights: $2M worth of cloud developer credits distributed
Placement cells connecting learners with remote opportunities

title: DevBuild Hackathon 2026
description: A 72-hour virtual and physical coding challenge where developers built tools resolving educational accessibility issues. Featuring live streaming evaluations and celebrity judge panels.
highlights: $100,000 in cash awards and hardware funding
Mentored by top tech executives from Silicon Valley

title: Build in Public: Open Source Summit
description: A campaign promoting the 'Build in Public' methodology. Students and developers published their progress daily on GitHub and Twitter, working together on a central modern web ecosystem.
highlights: Featured trending topics on developer networks
Direct Vercel sponsorship for the top 5 projects
